FK9smp6duh5f8y311pi5nec5h7p Hibernate: alter table product drop foreign key FKle1pobdrc8a2uw97gukfmvan4 Hibernate: alter table rating drop foreign key FKlkuwie0au2dru36asng9nywmh Hibernate: alter table rating drop foreign key FKc4t8k6ukp833gbb9dr9ejvnij Hibernate: drop table if exists category Hibernate: drop table if exists feedback Hibernate: drop table if exists product Hibernate: drop table if exists rating Hibernate: drop table if exists user Hibernate: create table category (category_id bigint not null auto_increment, category_name varchar(255), primary key (category_id)) engine=InnoDB Hibernate: create table feedback (rating integer, feedback_id bigint not null auto_increment, product_id bigint, user_user_id bigint, comment varchar(255), primary key (feedback_id)) engine=InnoDB Hibernate: create table product (price float(53), stock_quantity integer, category_category_id bigint, id bigint not null auto_increment, description varchar(255), product_name varchar(255), primary key (id)) engine=InnoDB Hibernate: create table rating (score integer, product_id bigint, rating_id bigint not null auto_increment, user_user_id bigint, primary key (rating_id)) engine=InnoDB Hibernate: create table user (user_id bigint not null auto_increment, email varchar(255), user_name varchar(255), primary key (user_id)) engine=InnoDB Hibernate: alter table feedback add constraint FKlsfunb44jdljfmbx4un8s4waa foreign key (product_id) references product (id) Hibernate: alter table feedback add constraint FK9smp6duh5f8y311pi5nec5h7p foreign key (user_user_id) references user (user_id) Hibernate: alter table product add constraint FKle1pobdrc8a2uw97gukfmvan4 foreign key (category_category_id) references category (category_id) Hibernate: alter table rating add constraint FKlkuwie0au2dru36asng9nywmh foreign key (product_id) references product (id) Hibernate: alter table rating add constraint FKc4t8k6ukp833gbb9dr9ejvnij foreign key (user_user_id) references testcase.system-out: Hibernate: select c1_0.category_id,c1_0.category_name from category c1_0

testcase.name: Day8_testAddCategory
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: insert into category (category_name) values (?)

testcase.system-out: Hibernate: select c1_0.category_id,c1_0.category_name from category c1_0

testcase.name: Day8_testGetCategoryById
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: select c1_0.category_id,c1_0.category_name from category c1_0 where c1_0.category_id=?

testcase.name: Day8_testUpdateCategory
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: select c1_0.category_id,c1_0.category_name from category c1_0 where c1_0.category_id=? Hibernate: update category set category_name=? where category_id=?
